titleStmt.title:
Colonel J. Hart Caughey to Brigadier General Thomas S. Timberman
Acting Director of Operations of Executive Headquarters at Peiping, during Brigadier General Byroade’s absence at Changchun.

head.hi: Colonel J. Hart Caughey to Brigadier General Thomas S. Timberman
head.note: Acting Director of Operations of Executive Headquarters at Peiping, during Brigadier General Byroade’s absence at Changchun.

div.p: 852. In letter to General Marshall from General Chou dated 6 JuneNot printed. he says that General Fang Fang, Communist representative in Canton, reports that many obstacles by National Government, concerning food and money, is delaying Communist assemblage at Tapeng Peninsula 1 week. General Chou requests “U. S. vessels at Tapeng to stand by until embarkation is effected”. Request that you take appropriate action.General Chou was informed of this action by General Marshall in his memorandum No. OSE 137, June 8, not printed.
